hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. If the file path is inside a `voice-os/outputs/` folder OR the filename contains 'draft' or 'email', run the bundled anti-AI lint by executing `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/check-anti-ai.sh <full-file-path>` and surface every [FLAG] line back to the user as a system-level note. Do not block the write — just inform. If the file is not an email draft, do nothing.
